title: sesleria tenerrima
intro: Sesleria tenerrima, also known as Blue Moor-grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Sesleria tenerrima include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Sesleria tenerrima is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
